int countNumbersWithPrefix(String prefix, int n) {

    if (prefix.length() > String.valueOf(n).length()) return 0;

    long lower = Long.parseLong(prefix);

    int remainingDigits = String.valueOf(n).length() - prefix.length();

    long upper = lower + (10L ^ remainingDigits) - 1;

    if (upper > n) upper = n;

    if (lower > upper) return 0;

    return (int) (upper - lower + 1);

}

private int countNumbersWithPrefix(String prefix, int n) {

    String nStr = Integer.toString(n);

    if (prefix.length() > nStr.length()) {

        return 0;

    }

    long lower = Long.parseLong(prefix);

    int remainingDigits = nStr.length() - prefix.length();

    long remaining = 1;

    for (int i=0; i<remainingDigits; i++) {

        remaining *=10;

    }

    long upper = lower + remaining -1;

    if (lower > n) {

        return 0;

    }

    if (upper > n) {

        upper = n;

    }

    return (int) (upper - lower +1);

}

public int f(int x, int n) {

    String m = Integer.toString(x);

    int count =0;

    for (int i=0; i<m.length(); i++) {

        String prefix = m.substring(0, i);

        char currentChar = m.charAt(i);

            String newPrefix = prefix + d;

            int c = countNumbersWithPrefix(newPrefix, n);

            count +=c;

        // Check if the current prefix is already larger than m's prefix up to i

        String currentPrefix = m.substring(0, i+1);

        if (Long.parseLong(currentPrefix) > x) {

            break;

        }

    }

    return count;

}

public int findKthNumber(int n, int k) {

    String s = Integer.toString(n);

    StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder();

    for (int i=0; i<s.length(); i++) {

        for (char d = (i==0) ? '1' : '0'; d <= '9'; d++) {

            if (d < s.charAt(i)) {

                String newPrefix = result.toString() + d;

                int count = countNumbersWithPrefix(newPrefix, n);

                if (count < k) {

                    k -= count;

                } else {

                    result.append(d);

                    break;

                }

            } else if (d == s.charAt(i)) {

                String newPrefix = result.toString() + d;

                int count = countNumbersWithPrefix(newPrefix, n);

                if (count < k) {

                    k -= count;

                } else {

                    result.append(d);

                    break;

                }

            } else {

                continue;

            }

        }

    }

    return Integer.parseInt(result.toString());

}

public int f(int mid, int n) {

    String m = Integer.toString(mid);

    int count =0;

    for (int i=0; i<m.length(); i++) {

        String prefix = m.substring(0, i);

        char currentChar = m.charAt(i);

        for (char d = '0'; d < currentChar; d++) {

            String newPrefix = prefix + d;

            int c = countNumbersWithPrefix(newPrefix, n);

            count +=c;

        }

        // Check if the current prefix is already larger than m's prefix up to i

        String currentPrefix = m.substring(0, i+1);

        if (Long.parseLong(currentPrefix) > mid) {

            break;

        }

    }

    return count;

}

int countNumbersWithPrefix(String prefix, int n) {

    if (prefix.length() > String.valueOf(n).length()) return 0;

    long lower = Long.parseLong(prefix);

    int remainingDigits = String.valueOf(n).length() - prefix.length();

    long upper = lower + (10L ^ remainingDigits) - 1;

    if (upper > n) upper = n;

    if (lower > upper) return 0;

    return (int) (upper - lower + 1);

}

private int countNumbersWithPrefix(String prefix, int n) {

    String nStr = Integer.toString(n);

    if (prefix.length() > nStr.length()) {

        return 0;

    }

    long lower = Long.parseLong(prefix);

    int remainingDigits = nStr.length() - prefix.length();

    long remaining = 1;

    for (int i=0; i<remainingDigits; i++) {

        remaining *=10;

    }

    long upper = lower + remaining -1;

    if (lower > n) {

        return 0;

    }

    if (upper > n) {

        upper = n;

    }

    return (int) (upper - lower +1);

}

public int findKthNumber(int n, int k) {

    String s = Integer.toString(n);

    StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder();

    for (int i=0; i<s.length(); i++) {

        for (char d = (i==0) ? '1' : '0'; d <= '9'; d++) {

            if (d < s.charAt(i)) {

                String newPrefix = result.toString() + d;

                int count = countNumbersWithPrefix(newPrefix, n);

                if (count < k) {

                    k -= count;

                } else {

                    result.append(d);

                    break;

                }

            } else if (d == s.charAt(i)) {

                String newPrefix = result.toString() + d;

                int count = countNumbersWithPrefix(newPrefix, n);

                if (count < k) {

                    k -= count;

                } else {

                    result.append(d);

                    break;

                }

            } else {

                continue;

            }

        }

    }

    return Integer.parseInt(result.toString());

public int f(int mid, int n) {

    String m = Integer.toString(mid);

    int count =0;

            count +=c;

        }

        // Check if the current prefix is already larger than m's prefix up to i

        String currentPrefix = m.substring(0, i+1);

        if (Long.parseLong(currentPrefix) > mid) {

            break;

        }

    }

    return count;

}
